_meta.description: Single source of truth for Jira-driven frontend integration tests.
_meta.sourceTestRule: The Jira issue key itself is treated as the Xray Test issue key. In this frontend-it workspace testClass is a Playwright grep selector.

GUNSQA-85.note: Certificate attachment preview should not fail because router is undefined.

GUNSQA-86.note: Non-Excel uploads must be rejected before hitting the preview API.

GUNSQA-87.note: Download URLs must not expose the login token as a query parameter.

GUNSQA-88.note: Upload failure responses must not be shown as successful uploads.
